meta.title: LegalForge — Professional Contract Generator
meta.description: Generate professional legal contracts from customizable templates. Export to PDF or Markdown. Free, open-source, and 100% client-side.

hero.title: Generate Professional Legal Contracts in Minutes
hero.subtitle: Choose from 10+ customizable templates, fill in your details, and export to PDF or Markdown. Everything runs in your browser — no data is ever sent to a server.

features.title: How It Works
features.step1Desc: Browse our library of 10+ professional contract templates covering NDAs, services, sales, and more.
features.step2Desc: Enter party names, dates, amounts, and select optional clauses. See a live preview as you type.
features.step3Desc: Download your contract as a professional PDF or Markdown file. Ready for review and signatures.

disclaimer.text: This tool generates contract templates for informational purposes only. It does not provide legal advice. Always consult a qualified attorney before signing any legal document.

templates.title: Contract Templates
templates.subtitle: Select a template to start generating your contract

nda_mutual.name: Mutual NDA
nda_mutual.description: A bilateral non-disclosure agreement where both parties agree to protect shared confidential information.

nda_unilateral.name: Unilateral NDA
nda_unilateral.description: A one-way confidentiality agreement where one party discloses information and the other agrees to keep it secret.

freelance_services.name: Freelance Services
freelance_services.description: An independent contractor agreement covering scope of work, payment terms, deadlines, and intellectual property.

consulting.name: Consulting Agreement
consulting.description: A professional engagement contract for consulting services with deliverables, rates, and confidentiality terms.

sale_of_goods.name: Sale of Goods
sale_of_goods.description: A purchase agreement covering product specifications, pricing, delivery terms, and warranty conditions.

lease_rental.name: Lease / Rental Agreement
lease_rental.description: A property rental contract with terms for rent, deposits, maintenance responsibilities, and termination conditions.

partnership.name: Partnership Agreement
partnership.description: A business partnership contract defining contributions, profit distribution, decision-making, and dissolution terms.

employment.name: Employment Contract
employment.description: An employee hiring agreement with position details, compensation, benefits, confidentiality, and termination terms.

loan.name: Loan Agreement
loan.description: A money lending contract with principal, interest rate, repayment schedule, and default provisions.

website_tos.name: Website Terms of Service
website_tos.description: Legal terms governing website usage, user responsibilities, intellectual property, liability limitations, and privacy references.

generator.previewPlaceholder: Fill in the form to see your contract preview...
generator.fieldInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

editor.clauseHint: Click a clause to insert it into your contract
editor.placeholder: Start writing your custom contract here...
editor.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the editor? This cannot be undone.

footer.disclaimer: ⚠️ This tool does not provide legal advice. Consult a qualified attorney before signing any legal document.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for the open-source community

non_compete.name: Non-Compete Clause
non_compete.desc: Restricts parties from competing during and after the agreement.

non_solicitation.name: Non-Solicitation Clause
non_solicitation.desc: Prevents hiring or soliciting employees/clients of the other party.

intellectual_property.name: Intellectual Property Assignment
intellectual_property.desc: Assigns all created IP to the hiring party.

indemnification.name: Indemnification Clause
indemnification.desc: One party agrees to compensate the other for losses or damages.

force_majeure.name: Force Majeure
force_majeure.desc: Excuses performance obligations due to extraordinary events.

dispute_resolution.name: Dispute Resolution
dispute_resolution.desc: Specifies arbitration or mediation before litigation.

late_payment.name: Late Payment Penalty
late_payment.desc: Defines penalties for payments made after the due date.

early_termination.name: Early Termination
early_termination.desc: Allows either party to end the agreement before the term expires.

governing_law.name: Governing Law
governing_law.desc: Specifies which jurisdiction's laws govern the contract.

entire_agreement.name: Entire Agreement
entire_agreement.desc: States this contract supersedes all prior agreements.

amendments.name: Amendments
amendments.desc: Changes must be in writing and signed by both parties.

severability.name: Severability
severability.desc: If one provision is invalid, the rest remain enforceable.

confidentiality_obligation.name: Confidentiality Obligation
confidentiality_obligation.desc: Receiving party must protect confidential information.

return_of_materials.name: Return of Materials
return_of_materials.desc: All confidential materials must be returned upon termination.

ip_ownership.name: IP Ownership
ip_ownership.desc: All work product belongs to the hiring party.

warranty_disclaimer.name: Warranty Disclaimer
warranty_disclaimer.desc: Limits warranties to only those explicitly stated.

limitation_of_liability.name: Limitation of Liability
limitation_of_liability.desc: Caps the total liability to the contract value.

notice_requirements.name: Notice Requirements
notice_requirements.desc: Specifies how formal notices must be delivered.

checklist.parties_identified: All parties clearly identified with full legal names
checklist.obligations_clear: Obligations of each party clearly defined
checklist.payment_terms: Payment terms, amounts, and schedules specified
checklist.termination_conditions: Termination conditions and notice periods defined
checklist.signatures_prepared: Signature lines prepared for all parties
checklist.review_attorney: Contract reviewed by a qualified attorney (recommended)
checklist.copies_distributed: Copies to be distributed to all parties after signing

contractContent.preamble: This Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} ("Effective Date") by and between:
contractContent.recitals: WHEREAS, the parties wish to enter into this Agreement under the following terms and conditions:
contractContent.now_therefore: NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements set forth herein, the parties agree as follows:
contractContent.signatures_header: IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the Effective Date.
